zh.Powys Castle, Powys, Montgomery, Wales: 英國威爾斯波斯蒙哥馬利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Morfydd Ddu ferch Ynyr於0918年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根時，她的父親King Ynyr ab Owain of Gwent29歲，母親Queen Joyce de Balladon of Gwent28歲。她和Gwaithfoed ap Gwynnan至少有4個兒子。她去世於1019年1月9日在威爾士蒙姆爾享年101歲。

zh-hans.Powys Castle, Powys, Montgomery, Wales: 英国威尔斯波斯蒙哥馬利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Morfydd Ddu ferch Ynyr于0918年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根时，她的父亲King Ynyr ab Owain of Gwent29岁，母亲Queen Joyce de Balladon of Gwent28岁。她和Gwaithfoed ap Gwynnan至少有4个儿子。她去世于1019年1月9日在威尔士蒙姆爾享年101岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ynyr
meanings: Welsh: An old Welsh form of Honorius

nameMeanings.name: Ddu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 竇, meaning ‘hole’ in ancient Chinese: (i) adopted as a surname by Yue Zhu and Yue Long, two sons of Shao Kang, the sixth king of the Xia dynasty (2070–1600  BC ). Yue Zhu and Yue Long are said to have adopted Dou (竇) (meaning ‘hole’) as a surname because their pregnant grandmother had escaped from a rebellion through a hole in the wall before giving birth to their father, Shao Kang, who later recaptured the throne. (ii) traced back to the Dou (竇) family from the Di ethnic group and some other families from the Xianbei ethnic group in ancient China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 豆, denoting an ancient stemmed cup of bowl: (i) traced back to some inhabitants in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) adopted as the surname by the Chi Xiao Dou (赤小豆) and Dou Lu (豆盧) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 鈄, referring to a type of ancient vessel for drinking wine: said to be borne by the descendants of the Duke Kang of Qi (died 379  BC ), who was ousted from his throne in the state of Qi and sent into exile. It was said that he was forced to use the vessel Dou (鈄) to cook food during his exile, and some of his descendants inherited Dou as the surname to memorize this period.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the plant (Old English fearn). Modern use of this word as a given name dates from the 19th century, when it is also recorded occasionally as a boy's name in the United States. In some instances the given name may be a transferred use of the surname derived in the medieval period from the vocabulary word.

en.lifeSummary: When Morfydd Ddu ferch Ynyr was born in 0918, in Glamorgan, Wales, her father, King Ynyr ab Owain of Gwent, was 29 and her mother, Queen Joyce de Balladon of Gwent, was 28. She had at least 4 sons with Gwaithfoed ap Gwynnan. She died on 9 January 1019, in Monmouthshire, Wales, at the age of 101.

fr.Powys Castle, Powys, Montgomery, Wales: Montgomery, Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Morfydd Ddu ferch Ynyr est née en 0918, à Glamorgan, Galles, son père, King Ynyr ab Owain of Gwent, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Queen Joyce de Balladon of Gwent, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils avec Gwaithfoed ap Gwynnan. Elle est décédée le 9 janvier 1019, à Monmouthshire, Galles, à l’âge de 101 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Morfydd Ddu ferch Ynyr 0918 in Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater King Ynyr ab Owain of Gwent 29 und ihre Mutter Queen Joyce de Balladon of Gwent 28. Sie hatte mit Gwaithfoed ap Gwynnan mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 9. Januar 1019 im Alter von 101 Jahren in Monmouthshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Morfydd Ddu ferch Ynyr è nata il nel 0918 nel Glamorgan, Galles, sua padre, King Ynyr ab Owain of Gwent, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Queen Joyce de Balladon of Gwent, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli con Gwaithfoed ap Gwynnan. Morì il 9 gennaio 1019, nel Monmouthshire, Galles, all'età di 101 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Morfydd Ddu ferch Ynyrが0918年にウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父King Ynyr ab Owain of Gwentは29歳，母Queen Joyce de Balladon of Gwentは28歳であった。彼女はGwaithfoed ap Gwynnanとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1019年1月9日にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアで101歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Morfydd Ddu ferch Ynyr(이)가 0918년 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 King Ynyr ab Owain of Gwent(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Queen Joyce de Balladon of Gwent(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Gwaithfoed ap Gwynnan(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1019년 1월 9일 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 101세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Morfydd Ddu ferch Ynyr родилась в 0918 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени King Ynyr ab Owain of Gwent было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Queen Joyce de Balladon of Gwent, 28. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына от Gwaithfoed ap Gwynnan. Она умерла 9 января 1019 г. в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс в возрасте 101 год.
